welcomeBody: Tiny daily actions compound into the person you become. Let's design who you're becoming, then build the habits that get you there.
languageBody: You can change this anytime in settings.
futureSelfNameTitle: What's the name of your future self?
futureSelfNameBody: A label for who you're becoming. Something like "{example}". You'll see this every day.
visionTitle: Who do you want to become in 1 year?
visionBody: Describe the person you want to be in 2–3 sentences. We'll show this on your dashboard so you remember why you started.
visionPlaceholder: I am someone who is consistent, healthy, and present for the people I love…
whyTitle: Why does this matter to you?
whyBody: When motivation fades, your reason is what keeps you going. Write it like you'd say it out loud.
whyPlaceholder: Because the next decade should look different from the last one — I want to become someone I'm proud of…
signInBody: Use Google or your email to sign in. Your habit ticks will count toward the live community totals — and you can switch devices without losing data later.
signInDisabled: Authentication isn't configured yet (Firebase isn't set up). You can continue without signing in.
categoriesBody: Start with what feels right. You can change this later.
habitsBody: Tap to keep or drop each habit. You can always add more from /habits/new.
habitsNoCategories: Pick at least one category first.
